heading: Notices to be posted
label: 627 Notices to be posted
text: Every employer, employment agency, and labor organization shall post and keep posted in conspicuous places upon its premises a notice to be prepared or approved by the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission setting forth information as the Commission deems appropriate to effectuate the purposes of this chapter.
notes: Transfer of Functions“Equal Employment Opportunity Commission” and “Commission” substituted in text for “Secretary”, meaning Secretary of Labor, pursuant to Reorg. Plan No. 1 of 1978, § 2, 43 F.R. 19807, , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, which transferred all functions vested by this section in Secretary of Labor to Equal Employment Opportunity Commission, effective , as provided by section 1–101 of Ex. Ord. No. 12106, , 44 F.R. 1053.92 Stat. 3781Jan. 1, 1979Dec. 28, 1978
